response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale cloud infrastructure or distributed systems work; their background is primarily in JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web/mobile development with minimal evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or C++-centric systems design.
strengths: Strong full-stack and open-source contributions with diverse tech exposure
Proven mentoring and workshop leadership in testing and engineering practices
Experience with distributed systems via GISCollective and microservices at Dunnhumby
concerns: Only 1-2 years of C++ experience (NI LabWindows), far below 8-year minimum
No demonstrable cloud architecture or compute platform leadership experience
Lacks documented experience in technical leadership mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers
